mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM tb_sys_menu menu WHERE menu.del_yn = 'N' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tb_sys_role_menu_perm_rel permission WHERE permission.role_id = #{roleId} AND permission.menu_id = menu.menu_id )

SELECT count(*) FROM ( VALUES ('01KY3HYG200000000000000001'), ('01KY3HYG200000000000000002'), ('01KY3HYG200000000000000003'), ('01KY3HYG200000000000000004'), ('01KY3HYG200000000000000005'), ('01KY3HYG200000000000000006'), ('01KY3HYG200000000000000007') ) required(cd_grp_id) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tb_com_code_grp code_group WHERE code_group.cd_grp_id = required.cd_grp_id AND code_group.del_yn = 'N' )

SELECT count(*) FROM ( VALUES ('01KY3HYG200000000000000001', 'ACTIVE'), ('01KY3HYG200000000000000002', 'LOGIN_FAILURE'), ('01KY3HYG200000000000000003', 'BAD_CREDENTIALS'), ('01KY3HYG200000000000000004', 'MANUAL'), ('01KY3HYG200000000000000005', 'COMPANY'), ('01KY3HYG200000000000000006', 'EMPLOYEE'), ('01KY3HYG200000000000000007', 'EMPLOYED') ) required(cd_grp_id, required_cd) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tb_com_code code WHERE code.cd_grp_id = required.cd_grp_id AND code.cd = required.required_cd AND code.del_yn = 'N' )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_sys_org ( org_id, org_nm, org_type_cd, reg_id, reg_dtm, del_yn ) VALUES ( #{organizationId}, #{organizationName}, 'COMPANY', #{registeredBy}, #{registeredAt}, 'N' )

INSERT INTO tb_sys_user ( user_id, emp_id, login_id, user_nm, email_addr, mobile_no, acnt_status_cd, pwd_hash_val, pwd_chg_dtm, login_fail_cnt, inactive_dtm, last_login_dtm, pwd_init_req_yn, reg_id, reg_dtm, mod_id, mod_dtm, del_yn, inactive_rsn_cd, temp_pwd_expire_dtm, sec_ver ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{employeeId}, #{loginId}, #{userName}, #{emailAddress}, #{mobileNumber}, 'ACTIVE', #{passwordHash}, #{passwordChangedAt}, 0, NULL, NULL, 'Y', #{registeredBy}, #{registeredAt}, NULL, NULL, 'N', NULL, #{temporaryPasswordExpiresAt}, 1 )
INSERT INTO tb_sys_user_role_rel ( user_id, role_id, reg_id, reg_dtm ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{roleId}, #{registeredBy}, #{registeredAt} )

INSERT INTO tb_sys_log ( log_id, log_type_cd, proc_user_id, occur_dtm, log_cont, reg_id, reg_dtm, event_type_cd, tgt_type_cd, tgt_id, proc_result_cd, chg_smry_cont, req_trace_id, access_ip_addr ) VALUES ( #{logId}, 'SECURITY', NULL, #{occurredAt}, NULL, #{registeredBy}, #{occurredAt}, 'BOOTSTRAP_ADMIN_CREATED', 'USER', #{targetUserId}, 'SUCCESS', '최초 시스템관리자 생성', NULL, NULL )
